use_cases: Grid-based option selection with animated entrance effects
Interactive selection UI where clicking one card fades out unselected options
Animated picker interface with hover scale effects and spring physics
Decision-making component with visual feedback on selection
ai_summary: An animated card selection grid component featuring staggered entrance animations, hover scale effects, and click-based selection that visually fades out unselected cards. Built with Framer Motion using spring physics for smooth, responsive transitions. Supports configurable column layouts and custom callback handling for selection events.
